# Overview

`sample-project` is a small numeric-aggregation library. See the
[tutorial](tutorial.md) for a walkthrough and the
[api reference](api.md) for the formal contract.

## What's covered

The `mean` function is the main public surface. The `Aggregator`
class is provided as a streaming companion. See
[migration](migration.md) for v1 → v2 notes.

The migration page is intentionally a stub — this fixture
exercises the mid-band of inkwell's docs-coverage and
docs-staleness signals.
